channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: antfu/skills
item.description: Anthony Fu's curated collection of agent skills.

item.title: adenhq/hive
item.description: Outcome driven agent development framework that evolves

item.title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: moltbot/moltbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: moltbot/moltbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: moltbot/moltbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: moltbot/moltbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-OCR-2
item.description: (no description)

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-moltbot-skills
item.description: The awesome collection of Clawdbot Skills. (Clawdbot has officially been renamed to Moltbot)

item.title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
item.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

item.title: vercel-labs/skills
item.description: The open agent skills tool - npx skills

item.title: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
item.description: Complete Claude Code configuration collection - agents, skills, hooks, commands, rules, MCPs. Battle-tested configs from an Anthropic hackathon winner.

item.title: lucasgelfond/zerobrew
item.description: A drop-in, 5-20x faster, experimental Homebrew alternative

item.title: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
item.description: Claude Code skill that researches any topic across Reddit + X from the last 30 days, then writes copy-paste-ready prompts

item.title: npmx-dev/npmx.dev
item.description: a fast, modern browser for the npm registry

item.title: clawdbot/clawdbot
item.description: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞

item.title: tldev/posturr
item.description: A macOS app that blurs your screen when you slouch. Uses Vision framework for real-time posture detection.

item.title: VoltAgent/awesome-clawdbot-skills
item.description: The awesome collection of Clawdbot Skills

item.title: BanjoRecomp/BanjoRecomp
item.description: PC Port of Banjo-Kazooie made using N64: Recompiled (Windows/Linux/Mac)

item.title: NVIDIA/personaplex
item.description: PersonaPlex code.

item.title: sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills
item.description: The Ultimate Collection of 200+ Agentic Skills for Claude Code/Antigravity/Cursor. Battle-tested, high-performance skills for AI agents including official skills from Anthropic and Vercel.

item.title: SterlingChin/marvin-template
item.description: (no description)

item.title: different-ai/openwork
item.description: An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by opencode

item.title: ramonvermeulen/whosthere
item.description: Local Area Network discovery tool with a modern Terminal User Interface (TUI) written in Go. Discover, explore, and understand your LAN in an intuitive way. Knock Knock.. who's there? 🚪

item.title: github/copilot-sdk
item.description: Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: AvdLee/SwiftUI-Agent-Skill
item.description: Add expert SwiftUI Best Practices guidance to your AI coding tool (Agent Skills open format).

item.title: mikekelly/claude-sneakpeek
item.description: Get a parallel build of Claude code that unlocks feature-flagged capabilities like swarm mode.

item.title: QwenLM/Qwen3-TTS
item.description: Qwen3-TTS is an open-source series of TTS models developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, supporting stable, expressive, and streaming speech generation, free-form voice design, and vivid voice cloning.

item.title: KKKKhazix/Khazix-Skills
item.description: (no description)

item.title: benjitaylor/agentation
item.description: The visual feedback tool for agents.

item.title: supabase/agent-skills
item.description: Agent Skills to help developers using AI agents with Supabase

item.title: TrustTunnel/TrustTunnel
item.description: Modern, fast and obfuscated VPN protocol

item.title: ChartGPU/ChartGPU
item.description: Beautiful, open source, WebGPU-based charting library
